note: Audited all Rust log statements. Production code only logs errors, packet counts, and truncated public keys (not private). All key-holding types (WgDevice, WgConfig, WgPeerConfig, WgTunnel) have manual Debug impls that redact secrets. Fixed inconsistency: standardized WgTunnel preshared_key redaction to uppercase "[REDACTED]". All 16 security tests pass.
